# Why we left the cloud

*Published 2026-04-12 — by the platform team*

![]()

Three years ago we made the call most startups were afraid to make: we moved our
production workload off a hyperscaler and onto bare-metal servers we own. This
post walks through the reasoning, the migration, and the numbers a year later.

## The cost was the smaller half of it

People assume the cost savings are the headline. They're real — about a 60%
reduction in monthly infra spend — but they're not what made the decision.

What did was control. ...
